source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) calibrated from consulting engagements. industry_sources cite real published works supporting each lever thesis.

levers.lever_name: Store Network & Real Estate Portfolio Optimisation
levers.description: Exit sub-performing stores (below threshold revenue/sqft); renegotiate leases at renewal; shift from revenue-share to fixed-rent structures where profitable.
industry_sources: RAI India Retail 2024 (rai.net.in) — occupancy 6-12% of revenue; lease renegotiation at renewal saves 15-25%
Shoppers Stop FY25 Annual Report (BSE 532638) — store portfolio rationalisation cited as margin lever; closed underperforming stores
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — real estate optimisation savings from 3 India organised retail mandates

levers.description: Deploy RFID, AI-vision cameras, electronic article surveillance; improve inventory reconciliation frequency; staff awareness training.
industry_sources: RAI Retail Shrinkage Survey 2024 (rai.net.in) — India retail shrinkage 1.2-2.5% of revenue; top quartile achieves 0.5-0.8% via technology
Gartner Retail IT 2024 — RFID reduces shrinkage 30-50%; AI vision cameras improve loss prevention ROI
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — shrinkage reduction savings from 2 India organised retail loss prevention mandates

levers.description: Grow private label share of assortment in high-volume categories to capture 15-25pp margin premium vs. branded products.
industry_sources: RAI India Retail 2024 — private label penetration 8-20% of modern trade revenue; 15-20pp higher margin than branded
Trent FY25 Annual Report (BSE 500251) — Zudio private label strategy as key gross margin driver (>38% gross margin)
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — private label margin uplift savings from 3 India organised retail mandates

levers.lever_name: Direct Farm/Factory Sourcing & Supply Chain Compression
levers.description: Eliminate distributors and C&F agents; source directly from manufacturers and farms; deploy cross-docking to reduce handling touches.
industry_sources: DMart FY25 Annual Report (BSE 540376) — direct sourcing from manufacturers as key EDLC structural advantage; logistics cost 1-2% of revenue
CII Logistics India 2024 — direct sourcing reduces landed cost 8-15% by eliminating distributor margin
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — supply chain compression savings from 3 India grocery retail mandates

levers.description: Implement AI-based workforce scheduling aligned to footfall patterns; reduce overtime; use part-time/contractual staffing for peak hours.
industry_sources: RAI India Retail 2024 — workforce productivity: revenue per employee ₹35,000-₹55,000/month; scheduling tools improve by 15-20%
Gartner Retail Workforce 2024 — AI scheduling reduces excess staffing 12-18% without service level impact
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — workforce scheduling savings from 2 India retail operations mandates

levers.description: Consolidate online and offline technology stacks (OMS, WMS, loyalty). Reduce duplicate IT maintenance costs; enable ship-from-store to reduce fulfilment cost.
industry_sources: Gartner Retail IT 2024 — omnichannel IT stack consolidation reduces technology spend 15-20% vs. siloed systems
Shoppers Stop FY25 Annual Report — omnichannel investments as growth and efficiency enabler
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — omnichannel IT savings from 2 India organised retail technology mandates
